description: Let workspace admins invite, update, revoke, and audit members.

userStories.title: Add membership invite and audit schema
userStories.description: As a platform team, I want persistence for workspace invites and membership audit events so that admin actions are stored reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Add storage for pending workspace invitations keyed by workspace and email
Add storage for membership audit log entries with actor, action, target member, and timestamp
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose workspace membership domain types
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared membership types for roles, invites, and audit events so that admin workflows use consistent contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared types include workspace roles viewer, editor, and admin
Invite and audit entry types are available to server and UI layers
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add membership audit logging service
userStories.description: As an admin, I want membership changes recorded automatically so that I can review who changed access later.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide a reusable service or helper that records invite, role change, and revoke events
Audit entries include workspace, actor, action, target, and timestamp data
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend invite member workflow
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can submit an email invitation for a workspace member
Invite creation validates email input and stores a pending invitation
Successful invites record an audit log event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend member role change workflow
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member role so that workspace permissions match current responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can update a member role between viewer, editor, and admin
Role changes persist to the workspace membership record
Successful changes record an audit log event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend revoke member access workflow
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can remove an existing member from a workspace
Revoking access deletes or deactivates the membership record as designed
Successful revocations record an audit log event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add invite member form to workspace settings
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an invite form in workspace settings so that I can add collaborators from the management screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings includes an invite form that accepts an email address
Submitting the form triggers the invite member workflow and shows success or error state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add member role controls to workspace settings
userStories.description: As an admin, I want inline role controls so that I can adjust access without leaving the settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Each member row exposes a role selector with viewer, editor, and admin options
Saving a role change updates the member list using the role change workflow
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add revoke member action to workspace settings
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a revoke action for each member so that I can remove access from the management screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Each member row includes a revoke or remove action
Revoking access confirms intent and refreshes the membership list after success
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show membership audit log in workspace settings
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can understand who changed workspace access.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings shows recent membership audit entries with actor, action, target, and timestamp
The audit log view reads from the backend audit query and handles an empty state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
